doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: This document fundamentally misrepresents Illinois eviction law—the 5-day notice gives tenants the right to cure by paying rent, not an obligation to immediately vacate, and HUD would never co-issue guidance stating tenants need not seek le
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 98
REASON: This document fundamentally misrepresents Illinois eviction law—the 5-day notice gives tenants the right to cure by paying rent, not an obligation to immediately vacate, and HUD would never co-issue guidance stating tenants need not seek legal counsel or that notices alone authorize eviction without court process.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 98
REASON: This document fundamentally misrepresents Illinois eviction law—the 5-day notice gives tenants the right to cure by paying rent, not an obligation to immediately vacate, and HUD would never co-issue guidance stating tenants need not seek legal counsel or that notices alone authorize eviction without court process.
